title: Language Change - Consecutive language change
scenario: Consecutive language changes via Device Settings > Language section fail after firmware update prompt on Poly Bluetooth device
steps: 1. Pair and connect the Poly Bluetooth headset to the mobile device.
2. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected [Device Name].
4. Go to Device Settings and locate the Language section.
5. Select a new language from the available options.
6. Observe the prompt for a firmware update to apply the language change and confirm/initiate the update.
7. Wait for the firmware update to complete successfully.
8. Repeat steps 4–7 to perform a consecutive language change (select another language and apply via firmware update).
expected: The language change is applied successfully after each firmware update. The headset and app UI reflect the newly selected language. Consecutive language changes complete without errors, freezes, or failures.
